code: import React,{useState}from'react';import TodoItem from'../TodoItem';import{useTodosContext}from'../../context/TodosContext';import'./style.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ToDoPage(){const{todos,createTodo,updateTodo,deleteTodo,toggleTodo}=useTodosContext();const[newTodo,setNewTodo]=useState('');const[editingId,setEditingId]=useState(null);const handleAddTodo=()=>{const trimmed=newTodo.trim();if(!trimmed){return;}if(editingId){updateTodo(editingId,{title:trimmed});setEditingId(null);}else{createTodo(trimmed);}setNewTodo('');};const handleEditTodo=todo=>{setEditingId(todo.id);setNewTodo(todo.title);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"todo-page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"todo-panel ui-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"todo-kicker",children:"To Do"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"To Do List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"todo-text",children:"Add, edit, toggle, and delete tasks, then open each item in its details page."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"todo-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:newTodo,onChange:event=>setNewTodo(event.target.value),placeholder:"Write a new task..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"ui-button ui-button--primary",onClick:handleAddTodo,children:editingId?'Save Todo':'Add Todo'}),editingId?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"ui-button ui-button--secondary",onClick:()=>{setEditingId(null);setNewTodo('');},children:"Cancel"}):null]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"todo-grid",children:todos.map(todo=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TodoItem,{id:todo.id,title:todo.title,completed:todo.completed,todo:todo,onToggle:()=>toggleTodo(todo.id),onEdit:()=>handleEditTodo(todo),onDelete:()=>deleteTodo(todo.id)},todo.id))})]})});}
